title: Skill security
commands_run: moon run archon:validate (selfcheck skill scan gate positive/negative fixtures)
outcome: Per-skill scan gate enforced: loadable skills (in profile allowed_skill_ids) require scan.status=passed and non-stale scan.hash=version. archon skills scan stub records scan fields back to TOML. _selfcheck_skill_scan_gate mirrors E05 negative-test pattern. docs/agent-rails.md extended: profile SkillSpector gate + per-skill scan together block unscanned/stale skills. E06 complete.
validation: moon run archon:validate PASS with scan gate selfcheck. Four loadable skills carry passing non-stale scans. touches⇒risks enforced for all records with non-empty touches.
decisions: SkillSpector execution deferred when not on PATH — structure + manual scan cache now
Catalogued unscanned patterns warn only; loadable skills fail validate
token_note: Trust prerequisite enabling safe on-demand loading — not a direct token lever, but prevents secret/context blowups from malicious skills.
